creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
I preferred the one from base since that simplifies the dependencies.  I doubt that it will make a substantial difference, so simplicity was preferred.

Still looking to see if it works successfully though.

In terms of notifications, if you are subscribed to elastic@ then you will get notified if elastic@ is the maintainer.  The positive is that so will everyone else on the mailing list :)
